results.comment_text:
@user1:
it should be 3 right? plus wrong comment

@author:
Wrong comment, true, thanks for the catch.

But I would leave the default to `None`, which allows to keep the previous policy in place: Try at least three times, but if there are more than 3 replicas, try every replica at least once. That seems reasonable to me, because otherwise there might be a healthy replica but the call still fails. If the default is 3, we don't know if it was user set, and can't implement the default policy.

An alternative would be to always try every replica at least once, regardless of what the user puts in (`actual_num_retries = max(retries, num_replicas)`). But it feels a bit off to me to take that control away from the user.

Edit: `None` doesn't work, changed it to `-1` with the same semantics
results.test_code:
# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_retries_default_and_help_text_are_updated__a1():
    source = open('/workspace/jina/parsers/orchestrate/pod.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert '--retries' in source, "Expected pod parser to define a '--retries' CLI argument"

def test_retries_default_and_help_text_are_updated__a2():
    source = open('/workspace/jina/parsers/orchestrate/pod.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert re.search('default\\s*=\\s*-1\\b', source), "Expected '--retries' to default to -1 (sentinel for 'use policy default'), but did not find 'default=-1' in /workspace/jina/parsers/orchestrate/pod.py"

def test_retries_default_and_help_text_are_updated__a3():
    source = open('/workspace/jina/parsers/orchestrate/pod.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'If None or <0' not in source, "Help text for '--retries' should not mention None anymore; expected semantics: 'If <0 it defaults to max(3, num_replicas)'"

def test_retries_default_and_help_text_are_updated__a4():
    source = open('/workspace/jina/parsers/orchestrate/pod.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'If <0 it defaults to max(3, num_replicas)' in source, "Expected updated help text for '--retries' to be: 'If <0 it defaults to max(3, num_replicas)'"
